items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Reassignment if needed'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Reassignment if needed', but the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this behavior. While the linked use case describes the expected behavior of reassignment, there is no direct evidence of the system's handling of reassignment scenarios or the conditions under which reassignment occurs. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's validation.
